name: Aim-Aiding
description: Armor etched with this rune aids in routing ranged attacks aimed at an enemy around you. You don't provide enemies cover against your allies' ranged attacks.

riders.text: You don't grant enemies cover against your allies' ranged attacks.

name: +1 Armor Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +1 item bonus to AC and unlocks 1 property-rune slot.

name: +2 Armor Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +2 item bonus to AC and unlocks 2 property-rune slots.

name: +3 Armor Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +3 item bonus to AC and unlocks 3 property-rune slots.

name: Authorized
description: Sharp needles impale anyone who attempts to wield this weapon other than its rightful owner. If any other creature wields the weapon, needles erupt from the hilt or shaft, dealing 1d8 piercing damage plus 1d4 persistent bleed damage to that wielder (increasing to 1d8 piercing and 1d4 persistent bleed per damage die if the weapon has a striking rune). When the rune is crafted, the crafter can broaden who may safely wield it (e.g. a particular bloodline, patron deity, or sanctification).

name: Called
description: With this rune, you can instantly retrieve an item in your possession without digging around looking for it.

actuated.name: Call Item
actuated.description: Requirements You have a free hand and the called item is in a bag, pack, pouch, or other container on your person, or unattended within 30 feet. Effect The item teleports to a free hand.

name: Catching
description: A catching rune creates a small, magical vacuum that attempts to pull weapons away from opponents. If you can attempt to Disarm as part of a Shield Block, such as with the Disarming Block feat or this rune's activated ability, a catching shield grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to such Disarm attempts.

actuated.name: Catching Rune
actuated.description: Free action. Trigger You Shield Block a melee Strike made with a held weapon. Effect You attempt to Disarm the creature whose attack you blocked of the weapon they attacked you with, with a +1 circumstance bonus. You can do so even if you don't have a hand free.

onBlock.summary: Free action (once per hour): attempt to Disarm the weapon you blocked — +1 circumstance bonus, no free hand needed.

name: Acid-Resistant
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 5 to acid.

name: Acid-Resistant (Greater)
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 10 to acid.

name: Cold-Resistant
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 5 to cold.

name: Cold-Resistant (Greater)
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 10 to cold.

name: Electricity-Resistant
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 5 to electricity.

name: Electricity-Resistant (Greater)
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 10 to electricity.

name: Fire-Resistant
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 5 to fire.

name: Fire-Resistant (Greater)
description: These symbols convey protective forces from the Elemental Planes. While wearing the garment, you gain resistance 10 to fire.

name: Shadow
description: A garment inscribed with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance. You gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing it.

name: Shadow (Greater)
description: A garment inscribed with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance. You gain a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing it.

name: Slick
description: This rune makes the garment slippery, as though it were coated with a thin film of oil. You gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Escape and to Squeeze.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Acrobatics checks to Escape or Squeeze.

name: Slick (Greater)
description: This rune makes the garment slippery, as though it were coated with a thin film of oil. You gain a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Escape and to Squeeze.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Acrobatics checks to Escape or Squeeze.

name: Stanching
description: These symbols close bloody wounds. A garment with this rune reduces the DC of the flat check to end persistent bleed damage from 15 to 12 (7 with particularly effective assistance).

riders.text: Flat check to end persistent bleed is DC 12 (7 with particularly effective assistance).

name: Stanching (Greater)
description: These symbols close bloody wounds. A garment with this rune reduces the DC of the flat check to end persistent bleed damage from 15 to 10 (5 with particularly effective assistance).

riders.text: Flat check to end persistent bleed is DC 10 (5 with particularly effective assistance).

name: Corrosive
description: Acid sizzles across the surface of the weapon. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d6 acid damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target's armor (if any) takes 3d6 acid damage (before applying Hardness); if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes this damage instead.

conditions.name: target's armor takes 3d6 acid damage (before Hardness); a raised shield takes it instead

name: Corrosive (Greater)
description: Acid sizzles across the surface of the weapon. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d6 acid damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target's armor (if any) takes 6d6 acid damage (before applying Hardness); if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes this damage instead. The acid damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's acid resistance.

conditions.name: target's armor takes 6d6 acid damage (before Hardness); a raised shield takes it instead

name: Crushing
description: Etched onto a bludgeoning weapon. When you score a critical hit with this weapon, the target becomes clumsy 1 and enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn.

name: Cunning
description: Etched on a slashing or piercing weapon, the rune performs divination magic on your foes' blood to grant insight into their abilities. Once per minute, if your previous action hit and dealt damage to a bleeding creature, you can activate it (free action, envision) to Recall Knowledge about that target, gaining an item bonus to the check equal to the weapon's potency rune bonus to attack rolls (and a +2 circumstance bonus if your hit was a critical hit).

name: Dragon's Breath (1st-Rank Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.

freeActions.name: Dragon's Breath
freeActions.description: Requirements You're receiving a bonus to AC from your dragon's breath cape or shield. Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell with an area of effect that deals the same type of damage as the depicted dragon's breath weapon, the spell gains the effects of the Widen Spell feat. The rune can only affect spells of 1st rank or lower.

name: Dragon's Breath (2nd-Rank Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.

freeActions.name: Dragon's Breath
freeActions.description: Requirements You're receiving a bonus to AC from your dragon's breath cape or shield. Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell with an area of effect that deals the same type of damage as the depicted dragon's breath weapon, the spell gains the effects of the Widen Spell feat. The rune can only affect spells of 2nd rank or lower.

name: Dragon's Breath (3rd-Rank Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.

freeActions.name: Dragon's Breath
freeActions.description: Requirements You're receiving a bonus to AC from your dragon's breath cape or shield. Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell with an area of effect that deals the same type of damage as the depicted dragon's breath weapon, the spell gains the effects of the Widen Spell feat. The rune can only affect spells of 3rd rank or lower.

name: Dragon's Breath (4th-Rank Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.

freeActions.name: Dragon's Breath
freeActions.description: Requirements You're receiving a bonus to AC from your dragon's breath cape or shield. Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell with an area of effect that deals the same type of damage as the depicted dragon's breath weapon, the spell gains the effects of the Widen Spell feat. The rune can only affect spells of 4th rank or lower.

name: Dragon's Breath (5th-Rank Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.

freeActions.name: Dragon's Breath
freeActions.description: Requirements You're receiving a bonus to AC from your dragon's breath cape or shield. Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell with an area of effect that deals the same type of damage as the depicted dragon's breath weapon, the spell gains the effects of the Widen Spell feat. The rune can only affect spells of 5th rank or lower.

name: Dread (Lesser)
description: Eerie symbols cover your armor, inspiring terror in your foes. Frightened enemies within 30 feet that can see you must attempt a DC 20 Will save at the end of their turn; on a failure, the value of their frightened condition doesn't decrease below 1 that turn.

riders.text: Frightened foes within 30 ft that can see you save DC 20 Will or stay frightened ≥1.

aura.effect: the frightened value doesn't drop below 1 this turn

name: Earthbinding
description: The weapon hums when touched to the ground. Once per hour, when you critically hit a flying creature with the etched weapon, you can use a reaction (concentrate) to have the rune cast a DC 20 earthbind spell on that creature.

name: Fearsome
description: Etched onto a weapon. When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes frightened 1.

name: Flaming
description: A weapon with this rune is empowered by flickering flame. The weapon deals an additional 1d6 fire damage on a successful Strike, plus 1d10 persistent fire damage on a critical hit.

name: Flaming (Greater)
description: A weapon with this rune is empowered by flickering flame. The weapon deals an additional 1d6 fire damage on a successful Strike, plus 2d10 persistent fire damage on a critical hit. Fire damage dealt by this weapon (including the persistent fire damage) ignores the target's fire resistance.

name: Frost
description: This weapon is empowered with freezing ice. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also slowed 1 until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 24 Fortitude save.

conditions.name: slowed
conditions.duration: until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 24 Fortitude save

name: Frost (Greater)
description: This weapon is empowered with freezing ice. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also slowed 1 until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 34 Fortitude save. Cold damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's cold resistance.

conditions.name: slowed
conditions.duration: until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 34 Fortitude save

name: Ghost Touch
description: This rune enables a weapon to damage non-physical beings, and it's exceptionally potent against incorporeal creatures, which typically have a specific weakness to ghost touch weapons. Incorporeal creatures can also touch, hold, and wield a ghost touch weapon, unlike most physical objects.

name: Glamered
description: This armor can be disguised with a mere thought. You can Activate the armor (envision) to change its appearance to that of ordinary or fine clothes of your imagining. The armor's statistics don't change, only its appearance. Activating the armor again returns it to its original form.

name: Greater Resilient
description: A fundamental rune that grants an item bonus to all saving throws.

name: Greater Striking
description: A fundamental rune that adds extra weapon damage dice on a hit.

name: Major Resilient
description: A fundamental rune that grants an item bonus to all saving throws.

name: Major Striking
description: A fundamental rune that adds extra weapon damage dice on a hit.

name: Menacing
description: Common among brutes who use the magic to scare others into compliance, menacing runes lend you a formidable appearance, granting you a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks to Coerce others.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Intimidation checks to Coerce.

name: Menacing (Greater)
description: Common among brutes who use the magic to scare others into compliance, menacing runes lend you a formidable appearance, granting you a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks to Coerce others.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Intimidation checks to Coerce.

actuated.name: Fear
actuated.description: The rune casts a 3rd-rank fear spell (DC 25).

name: Pacifying
description: This rune turns a weapon into an instrument of peacemaking. When you deal damage with the etched weapon, you can use a reaction to force the damaged creature to succeed at a DC 20 Will save or become pacified: the creature takes a –2 penalty to attack rolls with attacks that aren't nonlethal for 1 minute, as a psychic warning urges it to cease dealing lethal damage.

name: Paired
description: These runes always come in pairs, each applied to a separate item that has pockets.

actuated.name: Paired Exchange
actuated.description: Requirements The paired items are both invested, typically by two different characters, and are within 100 feet of each other. Effect Items in the pockets (up to 10 negligible-Bulk items or 1 light-Bulk item per pocket) trade places via teleportation.

name: Paired (Greater)
description: These runes always come in pairs, each applied to a separate item that has pockets. You can activate greater paired runes at a distance of up to 1 mile.

actuated.name: Paired Exchange
actuated.description: Requirements The paired items are both invested, typically by two different characters, and are within 1 mile of each other. Effect Items in the pockets (up to 10 negligible-Bulk items or 1 light-Bulk item per pocket) trade places via teleportation.

name: Pontoon
description: Footwear with pontoon runes allows you to traverse waterways with ease. While wearing footwear with the rune, you can walk on the surface of water and other liquids without falling through. This offers no protection against damage the liquid deals. You can go under the liquid's surface, but you must Swim if you do.

riders.text: You can walk on the surface of water and other liquids.

name: Presentable
description: A garment with this rune is always clean, as though it had just been affected by prestidigitation. You gain a +1 item bonus to Make an Impression on those who would be impressed by a particular presentable outfit while wearing this garment.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression on those impressed by the outfit.

name: Presentable (Greater)
description: A garment with this rune is always clean, as though it had just been affected by prestidigitation. You gain a +2 item bonus to Make an Impression on those who would be impressed by a particular presentable outfit while wearing this garment.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression on those impressed by the outfit.

name: Preserving
description: Preserving runes are common among merchants and other travelers who are on the road for weeks or months at a time. Any non-magical food and drink inside a container with a preserving rune remains fresher for longer, taking ten times as long to spoil. This feature doesn't prolong the duration of alchemical items.

riders.text: Food and drink inside take ten times as long to spoil (alchemical items unaffected).

name: Preserving (Greater)
description: Preserving runes are common among merchants and other travelers who are on the road for weeks or months at a time. Non-magical food and drink inside the container never spoil. This feature doesn't prolong the duration of alchemical items.

riders.text: Food and drink inside never spoil (alchemical items unaffected).

actuated.name: Cleanse Cuisine
actuated.description: The container casts cleanse cuisine on all the food and drink within.

name: Quenching
description: This rune counters burning and corrosive agents. Armor with this rune reduces the DC of the flat check to end persistent acid or fire damage affecting you from 15 to 12 (7 with particularly effective assistance).

riders.text: Persistent acid/fire flat check DC 15 → 12 (7 with effective assistance).

name: Ready
description: A ready rune lets you don or remove the etched armor in only a few seconds rather than minutes.

riders.text: Don or remove this armor as a single action (1 action) rather than minutes.

name: Resilient
description: A fundamental rune that grants an item bonus to all saving throws.

name: Retaliation (Lesser)
description: Shields with a retaliation rune use the impact of weapons to generate blasts of explosive force that counterattack foes.

actuated.name: Retaliation
actuated.description: Free action. Trigger You Shield Block a melee Strike. Effect You unleash force damage against the creature that made the triggering attack: 4d4 force damage, DC 20 basic Reflex save.

onBlock.summary: Free action (once per hour): 4d4 force damage to the attacker (DC 20 basic Reflex).

name: Retaliation (Moderate)
description: Shields with a retaliation rune use the impact of weapons to generate blasts of explosive force that counterattack foes.

actuated.name: Retaliation
actuated.description: Free action. Trigger You Shield Block a melee Strike. Effect You unleash force damage against the creature that made the triggering attack: 8d4 force damage, DC 27 basic Reflex save.

onBlock.summary: Free action (once per hour): 8d4 force damage to the attacker (DC 27 basic Reflex).

name: Returning
description: Etched onto a thrown weapon. When you make a thrown Strike with this weapon, it flies back to your hand after the Strike is complete. If your hands are full when the weapon returns, it falls to the ground in your space.

name: Calling
description: Your ring swirls with the energies and faces of those it would conjure. Etched onto a power ring.

actions.name: Veracious Summon
actions.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes. Effect The ring's magic guides your conjuration. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that would summon a creature capable of making Strikes, the summon gains a status bonus to its Strikes equal to your power ring's item bonus. You cannot use Veracious Spell until the summon spell ends.

name: Embodiment
description: Your ring swirls with the malleable magical essences. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you Cast a Spell with the polymorph trait that grants a battle form, you gain a status bonus to Strikes equal to the ring's item bonus until the spell ends.

name: Energy
description: Energy spells cause this ring to send a shimmering power through your hand. Etched onto a power ring; a spell attack roll referenced here counts only when the spell was modified by Veracious Spell.

freeActions.name: Gather Power
freeActions.trigger: Your last action was to Cast a Spell that dealt energy damage and was shaped by Veracious Spell.
freeActions.description: You absorb some of the energy you are about to expel into your power ring. You hold a charge of Gathered Power in the ring of that energy type. These charges last for 1 minute or until expelled by using Release Power.

actions.name: Release Power
actions.description: Requirements You have a charge of Gathered Power in the ring. Effect You shoot a ray of power from the stored-up energy in the ring. Make a spell attack roll against a target creature's AC within 30 feet, dealing 5d4 damage on a success or twice that amount on a critical success. You apply the ring's item bonus to this spell attack roll. The damage is of the same damage type as the energy used to Gather Power, and you expel the charge of energy from Gathered Power.

name: Energy (Greater)
description: Energy spells cause this ring to send a shimmering power through your hand. Your ring can hold two charges of Gathered Power. Etched onto a power ring; a spell attack roll referenced here counts only when the spell was modified by Veracious Spell.

freeActions.name: Gather Power
freeActions.trigger: Your last action was to Cast a Spell that dealt energy damage and was shaped by Veracious Spell.
freeActions.description: You absorb some of the energy you are about to expel into your power ring. You hold a charge of Gathered Power in the ring of that energy type (up to two charges). These charges last for 1 minute or until expelled by using Release Power.

actions.name: Release Power
actions.description: Requirements You have a charge of Gathered Power in the ring. Effect You shoot a ray of power from the stored-up energy in the ring. Make a spell attack roll against a target creature's AC within 30 feet, dealing 5d4 damage on a success or twice that amount on a critical success. You may instead expend two charges of the same energy type to deal 10d4 damage (twice that on a critical success). You apply the ring's item bonus to this spell attack roll. The damage matches the energy used to Gather Power, and you expel the expended charge(s).

name: Energy (Major)
description: Energy spells cause this ring to send a shimmering power through your hand. Your ring can hold three charges of Gathered Power maximum. Etched onto a power ring; a spell attack roll referenced here counts only when the spell was modified by Veracious Spell.

freeActions.name: Gather Power
freeActions.trigger: Your last action was to Cast a Spell that dealt energy damage and was shaped by Veracious Spell.
freeActions.description: You absorb some of the energy you are about to expel into your power ring. You hold a charge of Gathered Power in the ring of that energy type (up to three charges). These charges last for 1 minute or until expelled by using Release Power.

actions.name: Release Power
actions.description: Requirements You have a charge of Gathered Power in the ring. Effect You shoot a ray of power from the stored-up energy in the ring. Make a spell attack roll against a target creature's AC within 30 feet, dealing 5d4 damage on a success or twice that amount on a critical success. You may instead expend three charges of the same energy type to deal 15d4 damage (twice that on a critical success). You apply the ring's item bonus to this spell attack roll. The damage matches the energy used to Gather Power, and you expel the expended charge(s).

name: Immobilizing
description: When you blast magic from a hand wearing this ring, it encrusts the enemy in magical ice, stone, or wood. Choose cold, earth, shadow, or wood when you etch the rune; the rune gains that trait. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you critically succeed at a spell attack roll with a spell that has no duration and has the rune's chosen trait, the target is slowed 1 until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 24 Fortitude save.

name: Immobilizing (Greater)
description: When you blast magic from a hand wearing this ring, it encrusts the enemy in magical ice, stone, or wood. Choose cold, earth, shadow, or wood when you etch the rune; the rune gains that trait. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you critically succeed at a spell attack roll with a spell that has no duration and has the rune's chosen trait, the target is slowed 1 until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a DC 34 Fortitude save.

If you critically hit a creature already slowed by this rune with a second cold or earth spell attack, it attempts another Fortitude save. On a failure it is slowed 2 instead and the duration extends to the end of your next turn; on a critical failure it is instead petrified for 1 minute (this is an incapacitation effect).

name: Overwhelming
description: Magic that comes from overwhelming rings explodes out with unnatural force on random occasions. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: Spell attacks you modify with Veracious Spell score a critical success on a natural 19, as long as that result is a success. This has no effect on a 19 that would be a failure.

name: Precision
description: Precision rings can channel a massive blast of energy into a single thin ray that packs all the punch of its regular spell. Etched onto a power ring.

actions.name: Hone Spell
actions.description: You contain your magic to a single target. If your next action is to Cast a Spell that targets an area and requires a Reflex or Fortitude save, you may instead target one creature within range by making a spell attack roll against the target's AC. This makes the target the only creature affected by the spell, and the spell has no effect on a miss, applies the failure effect on a successful spell attack roll, and applies the critical failure effect on a critically successful spell attack roll. You apply the ring's item bonus to your attack roll.

name: Ramming
description: Ramming rings shoot foes rocketing away. Etched onto a power ring. (Force.)

riders.text: Your spell attacks deal additional damage to objects equal to the rank of the spell.

On a critically successful spell attack against a creature with a spell modified by Veracious Spell, the target must succeed at a DC 22 Fortitude save or be pushed back 10 feet from the origin of the spell.

name: Ramming (Greater)
description: Ramming rings shoot foes rocketing away. Etched onto a power ring. (Force.)

riders.text: Your spell attacks deal additional damage to objects equal to twice the rank of the spell.

On a critically successful spell attack against a creature with a spell modified by Veracious Spell, the target must succeed at a DC 32 Fortitude save or be pushed back 20 feet from the origin of the spell.

name: Righteous
description: Righteous rings somehow evoke those worn by old heroes and legendary figures of bygone eras. Etched onto a power ring.

freeActions.name: Justice Prevails
freeActions.trigger: You successfully hit an unholy creature with a spell modified by Veracious Spell.
freeActions.description: You overpower the evil ways of your enemy. The creature is enfeebled 2 until the start of your next turn.

name: Scourging
description: Spells cast with a scourging ring leave lasting wounds on the target. Choose acid, electricity, fire, or physical when you etch the rune; the ring gains that damage type's trait (or force, if physical). Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you critically succeed at a spell attack roll with a spell that has no duration and deals the rune's chosen damage type, the target also takes 1d10 persistent damage of that type (or persistent bleed if the spell dealt physical damage). If the spell already deals persistent damage, the DC to end it increases by 2.

name: Scourging (Greater)
description: Spells cast with a scourging ring leave lasting wounds on the target. Choose acid, electricity, fire, or physical when you etch the rune; the ring gains that damage type's trait (or force, if physical). Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you critically succeed at a spell attack roll with a spell that has no duration and deals the rune's chosen damage type, the target takes 2d10 persistent damage of that type (or persistent bleed if the spell dealt physical damage). If the spell already deals persistent damage, the DC to end it increases by 2.
Damage dealt from a spell attack roll modified by Veracious Spell ignores the target's resistance (including this persistent damage).

name: Warping
description: Spells cast through a warping ring can arc and change at sharp angles, letting you avoid allies and hit enemies around corners. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you Cast a Spell that requires a spell attack roll, you can select a single square within 15 feet to be the new point of origin for the spell. Determine line of effect, line of sight, and cover from there. The target must still be within range of the chosen square.

name: Warping (Greater)
description: Spells cast through a warping ring can arc and change at sharp angles, letting you avoid allies and hit enemies around corners. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you Cast a Spell that requires a spell attack roll, you can select up to 2 squares to redirect the spell's point of origin — the first within 15 feet of you, the second within 15 feet of the first. Determine line of effect, line of sight, and cover from the final square. The target must still be within range of that square.

name: Warping (Major)
description: Spells cast through a warping ring can arc and change at sharp angles, letting you avoid allies and hit enemies around corners. Etched onto a power ring.

riders.text: When you Cast a Spell that requires a spell attack roll, you can select up to 3 squares to redirect the spell's point of origin — the first within 15 feet of you, each subsequent square within 15 feet of the previous. Determine line of effect, line of sight, and cover from the final square. The target must still be within range of that square.

name: Wicked
description: Your ring shimmers with dark power, mocking those that fight for good. Etched onto a power ring.

freeActions.name: Curse the Righteous
freeActions.trigger: You successfully hit a holy creature with a spell modified by Veracious Spell.
freeActions.description: Your wicked energy saps at the creature's soul. The creature is off-guard until the start of your next turn.

name: Shadow
description: Shadow runes make armor lighter and softer. While wearing the etched armor, you gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

name: Shock
description: Electric arcs crisscross shock weapons, dealing an extra 1d6 electricity damage on a hit. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.

conditions.name: electricity arcs: equal electricity damage to up to two other creatures within 10 feet of the target

name: Shock (Greater)
description: Electric arcs crisscross shock weapons, dealing an extra 1d6 electricity damage on a hit. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target. Electricity damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's electricity resistance (and the other creatures' on a critical hit).

conditions.name: electricity arcs: equal electricity damage to up to two other creatures within 10 feet of the target

name: Slick
description: The defenses provided by this rune make it harder for foes to grab you. While wearing the etched armor, you gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Escape and to Squeeze.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Acrobatics checks to Escape or Squeeze.

name: Snagging
description: This animated item attempts to catch you when you fall. You can attempt to Grab an Edge, even if your hands are tied behind your back or otherwise restrained, so long as there's a solid edge within 10 feet. If you roll a success, you can Grab the Edge even if you don't have a hand free.

riders.text: You can Grab an Edge without a free hand (solid edge within 10 feet).

name: Soft-Landing
description: This item creates a small cushion of air that catches you when you fall. You treat falls as 10 feet shorter.

riders.text: Treat falls as 10 feet shorter.

reactions.name: Soft Landing
reactions.description: Frequency once per day. Effect You gain the effects of feather fall for 1 minute or until you stop falling, whichever comes first.

name: Striking
description: A fundamental rune that adds extra weapon damage dice on a hit.

name: Swallow-Spike
description: Your armor responds to your desire to break free of a creature grabbing you by growing spikes. Attacks made by armor with the swallow-spike rune apply the multiple attack penalty as if you had made them with another weapon.

riders.text: When grabbed/restrained, react to attack the grabber with armor spikes.

reactions.name: Grow Spikes
reactions.trigger: You become grabbed, restrained, or otherwise immobilized in a creature's grasp (including being engulfed or swallowed).
reactions.description: The armor attacks the immobilizing creature with a melee Strike: +14 (greater +22), dealing 2d6 piercing (greater 3d6), plus 1d6 extra if the creature is swallowing or engulfing you. Add an item bonus to the attack equal to the armor's AC item bonus, and an item bonus to damage equal to double that. This Strike applies (and increases) the multiple attack penalty as a separate weapon. If the damage equals or exceeds the immobilizing ability's Rupture value, you cut yourself free.

actions.name: Renewed Assault
actions.trigger: You're being held immobilized as described in the Grow Spikes reaction.
actions.description: The armor attacks the immobilizing creature again, as the Grow Spikes reaction.

name: Thundering
description: A thundering weapon lets out a peal of thunder when it hits, dealing an extra 1d6 sonic damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a DC 24 Fortitude save or be deafened for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).

conditions.name: DC 24 Fortitude save or deafened for 1 minute (1 hour on a critical failure)

name: Thundering (Greater)
description: A thundering weapon lets out a peal of thunder when it hits, dealing an extra 1d6 sonic damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a DC 34 Fortitude save or be permanently deafened. Sonic damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's sonic resistance.

conditions.name: DC 34 Fortitude save or permanently deafened

name: Trackless
description: Trackless runes are common among hunters and trappers, as well as thieves and anyone fleeing pursuit. While wearing trackless footwear, you are continuously affected by the vanishing tracks spell.

riders.text: You are continuously affected by vanishing tracks.

name: Trackless (Greater)
description: Trackless runes are common among hunters and trappers, as well as thieves and anyone fleeing pursuit. While wearing trackless footwear, you are continuously affected by the vanishing tracks spell.

riders.text: You are continuously affected by vanishing tracks.

actuated.name: Trackless Emanation
actuated.description: Effect You extend the effect of your rune out to a 20-foot emanation. The emanation remains for 8 hours, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within the area. You can Dismiss this effect.

name: Unexceptional
description: Merchants traveling into Stonebreach sometimes apply this accessory rune to specific wares to avoid the notice of thieves. Conversely, many thieves in Highhelm apply these runes to stolen goods to help them smuggle items out of the city. The item gains the effects of magic aura to appear as non-magical. The rune's effects also cause anyone who closely observes or holds the item to believe it is a mundane version of that type of item, unless the creature succeeds at a DC 18 Will save.

riders.text: The item appears mundane; close observers believe it ordinary unless they succeed at a DC 18 Will save.

name: Vitalizing
description: A vitalizing rune draws on positive energy. Against undead, the weapon deals 1d6 persistent vitality damage, and a critical hit also leaves the target enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn.

name: Vitalizing (Greater)
description: A greater vitalizing rune deals 2d6 persistent vitality damage to undead, and a critical hit leaves the target enfeebled 1 and stupefied 1 while the persistent damage continues.

name: +1 Weapon Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and unlocks 1 property-rune slot.

name: +2 Weapon Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and unlocks 2 property-rune slots.

name: +3 Weapon Potency
description: A fundamental rune that grants a +3 item bonus to attack rolls and unlocks 3 property-rune slots.
